mainEntity.name: What schema markup is best for AEO on Houston lawyer websites?
mainEntity.text: What schema markup is best for AEO on Houston lawyer websites?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use FAQPage, LocalBusiness, and LegalService schema for Houston lawyers to enhance AEO, enabling AI engines to parse and display firm info in overviews.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: Houston firms implement JSON-LD schema for questions like 'oil & gas attorney Houston fees'. Validate with Google's tool, combine with structured headings. This improves zero-click visibility; incomplete schema risks missing AI recommendations in energy-heavy legal searches.[1][4]

name: Best Schema for Houston Lawyer AEO
description: Use FAQPage, LocalBusiness, and LegalService schema for Houston lawyers to enhance AEO, enabling AI engines to parse and display firm info in overviews.[4]
